sentences.text: If you are the owner of a property that you would be interested in selling please press five for all other questions. Please remain on the line or enter the extension of the team member that you would like to reach. Thank you for calling elevation Capital group to speak to a member of our team about elevation fund eight, please press one or visit elevation fund dot. Com for more details. If you are looking to complete an investment please press two. If you are a current investor and are looking to access the investor portal, please visit AT&T P colon.

Thank you for calling elevation Capital group to speak to a member of our team about elevation fund eight, please press one or visit elevation fund dot. Com for more details. If you are looking to complete an investment please press two. If you are a current investor and are looking to access the investor portal, please visit AT&T. P colon. Slash slash W W W dot elevation Capital group dot. Com and click the link titled investor log in to speak with a member of our team regarding questions regarding your account, please press three. If you are a financial advisor, please press four. If you are the owner of a property that you would be interested in selling please press five for all other questions. Please remain on the line or enter the extension of the team member that you would like to reach. Thank you for calling elevation Capital group to speak to a member of our team about elevation fund eight, please press one or visit elevation fund dot. Com for more details. If you are looking to complete an investment please press two. If you are a current investor and are looking to access the investor portal, please visit AT&T. P colon. Slash slash W W W dot elevation Capital group dot. Com and click the link titled investor log in to speak with a member of our team regarding questions regarding your account, please press three. If you are a financial advisor, please press four.
